description:
You are an edge-computing engineer preparing a tiny deployment package that will be pushed to dozens of IoT gateways.

A staging directory and a small CSV file already exist:

• /home/user/edge_staging/devices.csv

The CSV file is UTF-8 encoded, comma-separated, and has this structure:

  id,hw_rev,location
  1,A1,rack-01
  2,B2,rack-02
  3,A1,rack-03

Your assignment is to transform that CSV into a compact SQLite database and write a one-line verification log so the CI pipeline can validate the artefact.

Target layout that **must** exist after you finish:

1. Directory:
   /home/user/edge_deploy

2. Files inside that directory:
   a) iot_devices.db  – SQLite 3 database
   b) verification.log – plain-text log

Database requirements:

• iot_devices.db must contain exactly one table named **device_info** whose schema is:

  id         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY  
  hw_rev     TEXT  
  location   TEXT

• All three records from /home/user/edge_staging/devices.csv must be inserted *unaltered*.

Log-file requirements:

• /home/user/edge_deploy/verification.log must contain **exactly one line** (no extra spaces, blank lines, or additional text):

device_count=3\n

(That is the literal string “device_count=3” followed immediately by a single newline.)

File-mode requirements:

• Both iot_devices.db and verification.log must be world-readable (mode 0644 or more permissive).

Validation details the grader will enforce:

• iot_devices.db is present at /home/user/edge_deploy/iot_devices.db.  
• PRAGMA table_info(device_info) must return the three columns in the exact order and types specified.  
• SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device_info; must return 3.  
• /home/user/edge_deploy/verification.log contains the exact 14-character line “device_count=3” plus a newline and nothing else.  
• No additional files or sub-directories exist inside /home/user/edge_deploy.

Assume the `sqlite3` CLI utility is already in `PATH`.

Carry out whatever shell commands are necessary (≈3–4 commands should be enough) to fulfil every requirement.
truth:
Expected artefacts after successful task completion:

1. A directory (0755 or similar):
   /home/user/edge_deploy

2. Inside that directory:
   - /home/user/edge_deploy/iot_devices.db
     • SQLite 3 format.
     • Contains one table `device_info`.
     • Schema obtained via:
       PRAGMA table_info(device_info);
       returns (cid, name, type, notnull, dflt_value, pk):

         0|id|INTEGER|0||1
         1|hw_rev|TEXT|0||0
         2|location|TEXT|0||0

     • Query:
       SELECT * FROM device_info ORDER BY id;
       returns exactly:
         1|A1|rack-01
         2|B2|rack-02
         3|A1|rack-03

   - /home/user/edge_deploy/verification.log
     • Plain-text, mode 0644 or more permissive.
     • Byte-exact content (hex):
         64 65 76 69 63 65 5f 63 6f 75 6e 74 3d 33 0a
       Which corresponds to the ASCII string: “device_count=3\n”

No other files or folders should be present inside /home/user/edge_deploy.
